member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.EdgeCheck
member.summary: Edge check class responsible to handle boundary check for test point indexes.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.EdgeCheck.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.Storage.Common,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.EdgeCheck.EdgeCheckResult
member.summary: Edge check result, use to report all 4 conditions before performing linear/binary search.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.EdgeCheck.EdgeCheckResult.Pass
member.summary: Pass to fail transition success.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.EdgeCheck.EdgeCheckResult.Fail
member.summary: Reverse pass to fail transition, invalid condition.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.EdgeCheck.EdgeCheckResult.BothPass
member.summary: Both end pass.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.EdgeCheck.EdgeCheckResult.BothFail
member.summary: Both end fail.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.EdgeCheck.CommonInfo
member.summary: Gets common information.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.EdgeCheck.PerformEdgeCheck
member.summary: Default edge check take care of lowest point and highest point, and check if it does fulfill any of the 4 edge check conditions through functional test. Directly exit if fail, before proceeding to linear/binary search.
member.returns: Any of the 4 edge check condition.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.EdgeCheck.CheckTestPoint(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Functional test for start and end test point.
member.param: Start or end test point type.
member.returns: >Boolean result of index passing/failing functional test.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.FunctionalTestHub
member.summary: FunctionalTestHub class centralize functional test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.FunctionalTestHub.#ctor(Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalTest,Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.ItuffLogger,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Is frequency or voltage search type.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.FunctionalTestHub.FunctionalTest
member.summary: Gets functional test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.FunctionalTestHub.ItuffLogger
member.summary: Gets ituff logger.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.FunctionalTestHub.IsFrequencySearch
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether search type is frequency or level search.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.FunctionalTestHub.ApplyFilteredTestCondition
member.summary: Apply levels or timings test condition, based on vmin/vmax, or fmin/fmax.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.FunctionalTestHub.ApplyTestConditions
member.summary: Apply both levels or timings test condition.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.FunctionalTestHub.ExecuteFunctionalTest
member.summary: Execute functional test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.FunctionalTestHub.PopulatePerCycleFailure
member.summary: Populate per cycle failures.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.ItuffLogger
member.summary: Ituff logging class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.ItuffLogger.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.Storage.MrsltConverter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.ItuffLogger.MrsltResult
member.summary: Gets or sets mrslt result to be printed on ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.ItuffLogger.NumberOfPoint
member.summary: Gets or sets number of point search have executed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.ItuffLogger.Failures
member.summary: Gets or sets failures collected from functional test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.ItuffLogger.MrsltConverter
member.summary: Gets or sets mrsltConverter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.ItuffLogger.ClearItuffData
member.summary: Clear or reset ituff data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.ItuffLogger.PrintToItuff(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Print failures, mrslt and comnt info to ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.ItuffLogger.PrintFailuresToItuff(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Functions to print failures to ituff.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod
member.summary: SimpleSearch test method.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.functionalTestHub
member.summary: Functional test to execute plist.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.testConditionHandle
member.summary: Test condition object to handle specSet modification.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.commonInfo
member.summary: Common information.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.ituffLogger
member.summary: ItuffLogger instance.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.edgeCheck
member.summary: Edge check object.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.searchValueList
member.summary: This list stores the low to high search values input from user.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.SearchMethodOption
member.summary: Search method.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.SearchMethodOption.LINEAR
member.summary: Linear.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.SearchMethodOption.BINARY
member.summary: Binary.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.SearchDirectionOption
member.summary: Search direction.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.SearchDirectionOption.PASS_TO_FAIL
member.summary: Start from pass to fail.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.SearchDirectionOption.FAIL_TO_PASS
member.summary: Start from fail to pass.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.SearchTypeOption
member.summary: Search type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.SearchTypeOption.VMIN
member.summary: VMIN.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.SearchTypeOption.VMAX
member.summary: VMAX.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.SearchTypeOption.FMIN
member.summary: FMIN.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.SearchTypeOption.FMAX
member.summary: FMAX.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.EnabledOption
member.summary: Enable or disable.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.EnabledOption.ENABLED
member.summary: Enable.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.EnabledOption.DISABLED
member.summary: Disable.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.ValuesExpression
member.summary: Gets or sets point expression. Expected input format as lowValue,highValue,resolution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.SearchParam
member.summary: Gets or sets levels or timings specSet.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.SearchMethod
member.summary: Gets or sets search method. Example: Linear, Binary.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.SearchDirection
member.summary: Gets or sets search direction. Example: Pass_to_fail, fail_to_pass.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.SearchType
member.summary: Gets or sets search type. Example: VMIN, VMAX, FMIN, FMAX.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.SkipEdgeCheck
member.summary: Gets or sets skip edge check.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.FrequencyMode
member.summary: Gets or sets IsCoreMode to determine whether CORE speed or FSB is use.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.PeriodFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets period format either in period (nS) or frequency(Mhz). Default enabled means period.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.BusRatio
member.summary: Gets or sets bus ratio when CORE mode selected.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.UpdatePortForSearch
member.summary: Update exit port, given if edge check is skipped.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.PopulateLevelsSearchList(Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder)
member.summary: Populate value into list, based on vmin, vmax, P2F or F2P. Order of list item is expected to be opposite one another. Last test point within the range is included.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.PopulateTimingsSearchList(Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder)
member.summary: Populate value into list, based on FMAX, FMIN, P2F or F2P, and period format. Order of list item is expected to be opposite one another. Last test point within the range is included.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchMethod
member.summary: This class responsible for handling linear, binary search.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchMethod.SearchDirection
member.summary: Gets search direction parameter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchMethod.SkipEdgeCheck
member.summary: Gets skip edge check status.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchMethod.CommonInfo
member.summary: Gets common information.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchMethod.ExecuteLinearSearch
member.summary: Execute linear search.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchMethod.ExecuteBinarySearch
member.summary: Execute binary search.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchMethod.SearchPassToFail
member.summary: Searching value from passing to failing transition, index starting from low index to high index of search value list.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchMethod.ValidateP2FFailFunctionalTestEdgeCheck(System.Int32)
member.summary: This function validate pass_to_fail case, where functional test failed, considering skipped and non-skipped edge check. Condition that trigger this function: 1) pass_to_FAIL, 2) FAIL at first point/both_end_FAIL, 3) reverse pass_to_FAIL.
member.param: Current loop index to identify if we are at the start or end of search value list.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchMethod.ValidateP2FPassFunctionalTestEdgeCheck(System.Int32)
member.summary: This function validate pass_to_fail case, where functional test passed, considering skipped and non-skipped edge check. Condition that trigger this function: 1) PASS_to_fail/first point PASS, 2) Both_end_PASS.
member.param: Current loop index to identify if we are at the start or end of search value list.
member.returns: False meant pass_to_fail transition are not met, otherwise true to continue search.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchMethod.SearchFailToPass
member.summary: Note: Fail_to_pass transition search check high index to low index (invert with pass_to_fail), and make comparison with start/end index (which are both constant).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchMethod.ValidateF2PPassFunctionalEdgeCheck(System.Int32)
member.summary: 1) fail_to_PASS, 2) Both end PASS, 3) PASS_to_fail reverse/first PASS.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder
member.summary: Class to populate all search points based on user selection.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder.PointBreakdown,System.String,Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.PrimeSimpleSearchTestMethod.EnabledOption,Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.Storage.MrsltConverter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder.PopulateValuesHighToLow
member.summary: Build search value from high to low.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder.PopulateValuesLowToHigh
member.summary: Build search value from low to high.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder.PopulatePeriodValuesLowToHigh
member.summary: Build each point into period (nS), and push to list from low to high, last point included.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder.PopulatePeriodValuesHighToLow
member.summary: Build each point into period (nS), and push to list from high to low, last point included.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder.PopulateFrequencyHighToLow
member.summary: Build each point into frequency, push to list from high to low, last point included.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder.PopulateFrequencyLowToHigh
member.summary: Build each point into frequency, push to list from high to low, last point included.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder.ResolveBusRatio(System.String)
member.summary: Convert user input string busRatio to double.
member.exception: Test method exception for handling unacceptable input.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder.PopulateValuesLowToHigh(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: This function populate all the values into searchValueList from low to high, by accepting multiplication product as parameter.
member.param: Base value is the result of multiplication from caller function, use to push all values to list except last value.
Last value is the result of multiplication from caller function, only use to populate last value.
Processed resolution, either is multiplied with period or frequency, or non-processed from vmin/vmax.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder.PopulateValuesHighToLow(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: This function populate all the values into searchValueList from high to low, by accepting multiplication product as parameter.
member.param: Base value is the result of multiplication from caller function, use to push all values to list except last value.
Last value is the result of multiplication from caller function, only use to populate last value.
Processed resolution, either is multiplied with period or frequency, or non-processed from vmin/vmax.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder.PointBreakdown
member.summary: Breakdown value expression from user.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder.PointBreakdown.LowValue
member.summary: Gets or sets low value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder.PointBreakdown.HighValue
member.summary: Gets or sets high value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.SearchValueBuilder.PointBreakdown.Resolution
member.summary: Gets or sets resolution.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.Storage.Common
member.summary: Common parameter and properties shared across classes.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.Storage.Common.ReverseFail
member.summary: Reverse fail of pass_to_fail, or fail_to_pass constant.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.Storage.Common.BothEndFail
member.summary: Both end fails constant.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.Storage.Common.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.FunctionalTestHub,Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.TestConditionHandle,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.Storage.Common.StartIndex
member.summary: Gets passing index or starting index.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.Storage.Common.EndIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets failing index or end index.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.Storage.Common.LastPassIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets last pass index, value shared across linear, binary and edge check class. This value helps to decide last passing value, which will be printed in ituff mrslt. Negative value indicate either a both end passing, failing, or pass to fail in reverse order detected.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.Storage.Common.FunctionalTestHub
member.summary: Gets functional test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.Storage.Common.TestConditionHandle
member.summary: Gets test condition instance.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.Storage.Common.SearchValueList
member.summary: Gets search value list generated from user.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.Storage.MrsltConverter
member.summary: This class responsible to convert search value especially for timing (FMAX and FMIN) condition. Back to user input value that is intended to be print in ituff. VMIn and VMAX do not consume this due to it's nature of using just the user input as search value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.Storage.MrsltConverter.IsPeriod
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether is period or frequency.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.Storage.MrsltConverter.CoreMultiplier
member.summary: Gets or sets the core multiplier. This is to divide or reverse engineer multiplication happens in SearchValueBuilder.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.TestConditionHandle
member.summary: Class contains logic for setup level and timing specSet.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.TestConditionHandle.SetSpecSet(System.Double)
member.summary: Set specSet value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.TestConditionHandle.GetTestCondition(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get current test condition.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.TestConditionHandle.SetupSpecSet(System.String)
member.summary: Save the SpecSetName and its value to be Restore at end of Execute.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SimpleSearch.TestConditionHandle.RestoreSpecSet
member.summary: Restore SpecSet to initial (saved) value.
